content.name: Simple Hotkeys
content.author: Chem O`Dun
content.description: Small collection of simple hotkey actions built on the Native Hotkey API. Currently: rename the selected/targeted player-owned object via the vanilla rename popup, from any game mode.

text.description: Small collection of simple hotkey actions built on the Native Hotkey API. Currently: rename the selected/targeted player-owned object via the vanilla rename popup, from any game mode.
